publishedAbstract: * CephFS volumes fail to mount and CephClient reconciliation errors after upgrading to ODF 4.19+. * CephConnection/ClientProfile CRs are still using the legacy port for monitors despite monitors being on v2,3300.
publishedTitle: ODF/External Clusters Fail to Provision CephFS Volumes (PVCs) in OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF) v4.19+ - "no mds (Metadata Server) is up. The cluster might be laggy, or you may not be authorized"
